title: Pharmacist
description:
Who We Are

PeopleSolve is an international search firm recruiting experienced and qualified nurses and healthcare professionals from around the world. Our program is specifically designed to help Singapore & internationally educated nurses and healthcare professionals succeed permanently in our strategic partners healthcare organizations in Singapore and beyond.

Since our beginning in 2021, we have helped 6,000 + nurses and healthcare professionals, both full time and part time, to secure placements in key healthcare locations including hospitals, clinics, community care centers, testing and vaccination centers.

At PeopleSolve, we specialize in recruitment and outsourcing solutions for the healthcare industry.


What We Offer

  • An opportunity to touch the life of others, and make a difference in them.
  • An opportunity to work in one of Singapore's best health systems.
  • Highly competitive compensation package.


About the Role

  • Provide pharmaceutical care for excellent patient care.
  • Recommend and monitor drug therapy to achieve desired outcomes.
  • Provide drug information to patients and other healthcare professionals.
  • Identify, resolve and prevent drug-related problems.
  • Oversee the work of pharmacy technicians and pre-registration pharmacists.
  • Adhere to regulations, practices and policies established by regulatory agencies pertaining to pharmacy.
  • Follow all safety procedures to ensure patient safety.
  • Perform other administrative duties or ad-hoc quality departmental projects as required.
  • Work as part of a bigger team to provide quality patient care.


What We Are Looking For

  • Candidate must possess a Degree in Pharmacy.
  • Registered with the Singapore Pharmacy Council.
  • Hospital experience preferred but not necessary.
  • Strong attention to detail and ability to work with accuracy and precision.
  • Ability to work in team or independently.
  • Ability to communicate well and able to articulate procedures effectively.
  • Compassionate and good patient care.


Work Location

Singapore


Jean Lim

Reg No: R24124447

PeopleSolve Pte Ltd

EA Licence No: 21C0695

postedCompany.description:
PeopleSolve provides healthcare manpower solutions in Singapore, China, and internationally. 


It offers permanent full time and part time healthcare staffing solutions; local and overseas hiring expertise; medical English and clinical training programs; and outsourcing solutions for nurses, allied health and healthcare HR teams. 


The company provides a comprehensive range of service to support healthcare organizations of all sizes. Whether it's addressing nurses shortages or enhancing operational efficiency, PeopleSolve delivers customized services to contribute to the success of healthcare organizations globally. 


The company was founded in 2021 and is headquartered in Singapore (21C0695). 


For more information or inquiries, please contact us at: peoplesolve@peoplesolve.com.sg .
postedCompany.name: PEOPLESOLVE PTE. LTD.
